rows.effect_note: Compared against case_159 because case_160 and case_161 exports are missing locally.

notes: Settings are sourced from workbook Properties via manual_tw_futures_audit reports, not tracker rows.
Effect is measured against the previous audited case in this block; case_162 is compared against case_159 because case_160 and case_161 exports are missing locally.
max_leverage_cap mismatch is treated as accepted when it reflects the intentional no-margin-call export profile.
confirm_close_crosses mismatch is treated as accepted when use_confirm_transform=false.
